properties.name: South DeKalb
properties.description: Low-frequency bus service connecting residential neighborhoods to employment centers. High car-dependency despite low car ownership.

properties.name: English Avenue / Vine City
properties.description: Historic westside neighborhoods with significant transit gaps despite proximity to downtown employment. Food desert overlay.

properties.name: Mechanicsville / Pittsburgh
properties.description: South Atlanta corridor with high poverty concentration. Major employment access gap to Hartsfield-Jackson airport zone.

properties.name: Clarkston / North Clarkston
properties.description: Refugee resettlement community with extremely low car ownership. Long headways and no weekend service despite high need.
